notes: Subtags are nouns and proper names only — entities, asset types, strategies, instruments, programs, conditions. Descriptive classification is handled by claim_type. Flat taxonomy: one level only. A nugget may carry multiple subtags pipe-delimited, e.g. RE:MOB|RE:NNN|RE:CMBS.
